records.question: Which aircraft have flown to Honolulu and also have associated certificates?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.destination = 'Honolulu'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.destination = 'Honolulu'

records.question: Which Boeing 747-400 aircraft with a distance of 8430 flew from Los Angeles to Washington D.C., arriving at 04/12/2005 09:40, on a flight costing at most 235.98 and covering at most 2308 miles?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.destination = 'Washington D.C.' AND flight.price <= 235.98 AND flight.distance <= 2308 AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 747-400' AND flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 09:40' AND aircraft.distance = 8430
records.pred_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Boeing 747-400'
  AND aircraft.distance = 8430
  AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles'
  AND flight.destination = 'Washington D.C.'
  AND flight.arrival_date = '2005-04-12 09:40'
  AND flight.price <= 235.98
  AND flight.distance <= 2308

records.question: Which Boeing 737-800 aircraft with a distance of at most 3383 have a related certificate and also have a related flight departing on '04/12/2005 11:50' from Los Angeles to Dallas, where that flight has a distance of at least 1251 and a price of at least 182.0?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.departure_date = '04/12/2005 11:50' AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND flight.distance >= 1251 AND flight.destination = 'Dallas' AND flight.price >= 182.0 AND aircraft.distance <= 3383 AND aircraft.name = 'Boeing 737-800'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Boeing 737-800'
  AND aircraft.distance <= 3383
  AND flight.departure_date = '2005-04-12 11:50'
  AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles'
  AND flight.destination = 'Dallas'
  AND flight.distance >= 1251
  AND flight.price >= 182.0

records.question: Which Airbus A340-300 aircraft that have both flight and certificate records have flown from Los Angeles to Sydney with a flight distance of at least 7487?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE flight.origin = 'Los Angeles' AND aircraft.name = 'Airbus A340-300' AND flight.distance >= 7487 AND flight.destination = 'Sydney'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Airbus A340-300'
  AND flight.origin = 'Los Angeles'
  AND flight.destination = 'Sydney'
  AND flight.distance >= 7487

records.question: Which aircraft have flights arriving in Boston exactly at 04/12/2005 05:03 with a price at most 261.56?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.arrival_date = '04/12/2005 05:03' AND flight.destination = 'Boston' AND flight.price <= 261.56
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
WHERE flight.destination = 'Boston'
  AND flight.arrival_date = '2005-04-12 05:03'
  AND flight.price <= 261.56

records.question: Which Piper Archer III aircraft have flown at least 520 miles and are linked to employee Milo Brooks who has a salary of at least 20?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aid FROM aircraft
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Piper Archer III' AND employee.salary >= 20 AND aircraft.distance >= 520 AND employee.name = 'Milo Brooks'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT aircraft.aid
FROM aircraft
JOIN flight ON aircraft.aid = flight.aid
JOIN certificate ON aircraft.aid = certificate.aid
JOIN employee ON certificate.eid = employee.eid
WHERE aircraft.name = 'Piper Archer III'
  AND flight.distance >= 520
  AND employee.name = 'Milo Brooks'
  AND employee.salary >= 20
